1851980.name: CosmicBreak Universal 「モニカ・ゴールド」ファンパック
1851980.description:
CosmicBreak Universal is now offering a delightful item pack especially for Monica Gold's fans!

A must-have for all Monica Gold enthusiasts, this DLC included limited characters like Ult. Monica Gold and Monica-chan, parts, titles, and other exclusive items! Don't pass this chance up!
The item pck also includes a Garapon ticket and other useful goodies!

Pack Contents (Robots)
  • Ult. Monica Gold
  • Monica-chan

Pack Contents (Parts)
  • Monica Rucksack Booster（x1）
  • Monica Print Fan（x1）
  • Title [Monica Fan ♪]（x1）

Pack Conents (Other)
  • 100 Rt
  • SP Garapon Ticket（x5）
    [*Cosmo Harmonics 20%（x30）
  • Tune-Up Set 10（x5）
  • ALL×3 Ticket 1h（x3）

※Purchase of this Pack is limited to one per account.
※[SP Garapon Tickets] allow players to roll the Garapon in the Shop.
※The Zero Saber visible in the screenshot is not included in this Pack.
1851980.supported_languages:
英语, 日语*, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
